title: Cosmic's GUI Pack
description: A Texture Pack used by ItsCosmicMC on Youtube that changes the GUI to be a Purple-Cyan Gradient
body:
## I made a Texture Pack for Minecraft
Why? I was bored, anyways Im a youtuber who wanted a texture pack and made a texture pack

We got a nice purple-auqa color gradient

If you guys enjoy the texture pack I might make more!
